description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: For a residential address in ZIP code 60610 where fiber is available, select the cheapest residential fiber internet plan with at least 500 Mbps download speed and a contract term of 12 months or less, then proceed to the order review page.
tasks.name: For a residential address in ZIP code 60610 where fiber is available, select the cheapest residential fiber internet plan with at least 500 Mbps download speed and a contract term of 12 months or less, then proceed to the order review page.
tasks.description: For a residential address in ZIP code 60610 where fiber is available, select the cheapest residential fiber internet plan with at least 500 Mbps download speed and a contract term of 12 months or less, then proceed to the order review page.

tasks.instruction: Configure an Internet + TV + Home Phone bundle that includes at least 1 Gbps internet, a TV package with 120 or more channels, and a home phone option with unlimited nationwide calling, keeping the displayed monthly total under $130 before proceeding to checkout.
tasks.name: Configure an Internet + TV + Home Phone bundle that includes at least 1 Gbps internet, a TV package with 120 or more channels, and a home phone option with unlimited nationwide calling, keeping the displayed monthly total under $130 before proceeding to checkout.
tasks.description: Configure an Internet + TV + Home Phone bundle that includes at least 1 Gbps internet, a TV package with 120 or more channels, and a home phone option with unlimited nationwide calling, keeping the displayed monthly total under $130 before proceeding to checkout.

tasks.instruction: Among business fiber internet plans priced under $200/month, compare two options sorted by highest upload speed and then submit a quote request for the one with the higher upload speed, completing the business contact form.
tasks.name: Among business fiber internet plans priced under $200/month, compare two options sorted by highest upload speed and then submit a quote request for the one with the higher upload speed, completing the business contact form.
tasks.description: Among business fiber internet plans priced under $200/month, compare two options sorted by highest upload speed and then submit a quote request for the one with the higher upload speed, completing the business contact form.

tasks.instruction: As a new residential customer, after entering your address, schedule the earliest available installation appointment with a morning time slot that starts between 8:00 AM and 10:00 AM, then confirm the appointment details.
tasks.name: As a new residential customer, after entering your address, schedule the earliest available installation appointment with a morning time slot that starts between 8:00 AM and 10:00 AM, then confirm the appointment details.

tasks.instruction: In the demo account’s Wi‑Fi settings, edit the primary wireless network to change its name, update the password, switch the security mode to the most secure option available, and save the changes.
tasks.name: In the demo account’s Wi‑Fi settings, edit the primary wireless network to change its name, update the password, switch the security mode to the most secure option available, and save the changes.
tasks.description: In the demo account’s Wi‑Fi settings, edit the primary wireless network to change its name, update the password, switch the security mode to the most secure option available, and save the changes.

tasks.instruction: From the billing section of the account, make a one-time partial payment toward the current bill using a debit card, paying less than the full amount due and ensuring the card is not saved for future use.
tasks.name: From the billing section of the account, make a one-time partial payment toward the current bill using a debit card, paying less than the full amount due and ensuring the card is not saved for future use.
tasks.description: From the billing section of the account, make a one-time partial payment toward the current bill using a debit card, paying less than the full amount due and ensuring the card is not saved for future use.

tasks.instruction: From your existing fiber internet services, add the lowest-priced static IP address add-on available and confirm the changes so the updated monthly total reflects this new add-on.
tasks.name: From your existing fiber internet services, add the lowest-priced static IP address add-on available and confirm the changes so the updated monthly total reflects this new add-on.
tasks.description: From your existing fiber internet services, add the lowest-priced static IP address add-on available and confirm the changes so the updated monthly total reflects this new add-on.

tasks.instruction: In the support area, check current service outage information for ZIP code 94110 and then enroll a mobile number to receive SMS outage alerts for that area going forward.
tasks.name: In the support area, check current service outage information for ZIP code 94110 and then enroll a mobile number to receive SMS outage alerts for that area going forward.

tasks.instruction: From the available router hardware, filter to Wi‑Fi 6 routers renting for under $9.99 per month with a customer rating of at least 4.5 stars, then add the first matching router to your cart and view the cart.
